phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è il banco check-in, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH eel BAHN-koh check-in, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Al piano superiore, seguire le indicazioni.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL pee-AH-noh soo-peh-ree-OH-reh seh-goo-EE-reh LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee
likely_response.translation_en: On the upper floor, follow the signs.

responses.english: On the upper floor, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: AHL pee-AH-noh soo-peh-ree-OH-reh seh-goo-EE-reh LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee
responses.local: Al piano superiore, seguire le indicazioni.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è la fermata dell'autobus per il centro, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH lah fer-MAH-tah del-low-toh-BOOS per eel CHEN-troh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Outside the exit, on the right.

responses.english: Outside the exit, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, ogni quanto passa l'autobus, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, OH-nyee KWAN-toh PAS-sah low-toh-BOOS, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trovano i bagni, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see TROH-vah-noh ee BAH-nyee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, near the exit.

responses.english: On the ground floor, near the exit.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si comprano i biglietti dell'autobus, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see KOM-prah-noh ee bee-LYET-tee del-low-toh-BOOS, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, on the right.

responses.english: At the ticket office, on the right.
